rationale: PR #110 implements v12 Task 1 exactly as frozen, with no reinterpretation and no scope expansion. package.json sets name/private/type/engines.node>=18, omits both dependency fields (zero-deps verified), and wires npm test to check then test-all. check.mjs recursively collects every clotho/**/*.mjs, normalizes to POSIX relative paths, sorts, and runs process.execPath --check via execFileSync with no shell. test-all.mjs holds a committed ordered TESTS list (scripts/test-registry.mjs), spawns each in a fresh Node process, and fails closed on any unlisted test-*.mjs (self excluded). The scaffold test prints exactly "clotho scaffold OK". The only non-clotho change is appending .telos/clotho/ to .gitignore; .github/workflows is untouched (gate: workflows-untouched); no spine or existing-package source is in the diff. ESM-only, node:-prefixed stdlib, Node>=18, zero runtime deps. Deterministic gate 10/10 meets. Accept AS-IS.
